team.date_founded: Founded on Eris, the most distant outpost in the leagues, by settlers who chose the edge of everything.
team.badge: A jagged star at the far edge of a thin disc, turned away from the sun.
team.home_kit: Deep void-violet and black with a fractured-star motif.
team.third_kit: Near-black with a single distant star.
team.history: Eris Wanderers play with the chip-on-the-shoulder defiance of the system's most remote club. Counterattacking specialists who relish the long, lonely journey to every away game, they take grim pleasure in spoiling the parties of warmer, richer worlds.
team.club_culture: Defiant, hardy, and proudly contrarian. The Discordant exist to disrupt.
team.political_leaning: Kuiper-separatist — the loudest voice for the outer worlds' independence.
trophy_cabinet: A reputation for ruining favourites' seasons
legends: Strife Calder — the counterattacking captain who scored on the longest away trips
achievements: Most away points won by a Kuiper side

stadium.date_built: A frontier ground at the literal edge of settled space.
stadium.sponsors: Backed by the remote outpost's survival co-operatives.
stadium.pitch_size: Standard, with deep space to launch the counter.
stadium.bio: The Outpost is the most distant venue in the leagues — cold, defiant, and proud of how far visitors must travel to lose there. Few away days are more dreaded.

training_facility.date_built: A basic facility at the edge of everything.
training_facility.bio: The Long Road Training Ground drills transition and resilience, preparing the Discordant for the brutal counterattacking, long-travelling life of the system's edge.

manager.appearance: Hard-bitten and defiant, wears the cold like a badge.
manager.bio: Distant Cruz is a counterattacking spoiler who has turned remoteness into a weapon. His Wanderers sit deep, soak up pressure, and punish complacent favourites with cold, sudden breaks.
manager.playing_history: A counterattacking forward at the system's smallest clubs.
manager.playing_philosophy: Make them travel, make them wait, and break their hearts on the counter.
manager.culture: An edge-dweller who relishes spoiling the centre's party.
achievements: Built the Kuiper's best away record

managing_staff.appearance: Weathered and practical, plans every gruelling away trip.
managing_staff.bio: Far Christodoulou specialises in long-journey preparation, keeping the Wanderers sharp through the system's most punishing travel schedules.
managing_staff.playing_philosophy: The journey is half the battle; win it before kickoff.

players.appearance: Steady and proactive, starts the break.
players.bio: Chaos Vasquez is the balanced keeper who launches the Wanderers' counters from deep.

players.appearance: Tireless and rugged, grafts the flank.
players.bio: Anarchy Cruz is the workhorse full-back who covers the channel and breaks fast.
achievements: Most distance covered by a defender

players.appearance: Selfless and steady, the deep defender.
players.bio: Discord Okafor is the team-first defender who holds the deep block patient.
Strife Sato is the aggressive defender who breaks up attacks to feed the counter.

players.appearance: Balanced and watchful, times the break.
players.bio: Unrest Lee is the composed defender who reads the moment to counter.

players.appearance: Inventive and quick, the break's brain.
players.bio: Havoc Kim is the creative spark who threads the killing pass on the counter.

players.appearance: Willing and selfless, the transition engine.
players.bio: Tumult Mori is the team-first runner who powers the break from deep.

players.appearance: Balanced and tidy, the controlled link.
players.bio: Mayhem Nakamura is the composed midfielder who keeps the counter purposeful.
achievements: Highest pass completion on the break

players.appearance: Lean and predatory, the point of the break.
players.bio: Mayhem Rivera is the selfish finisher who feeds on the space the counter creates.

players.appearance: Direct and combative, sparks the break.
players.bio: Bedlam Patel is the aggressive forward who triggers the counter by hounding defenders.
achievements: Most high turnovers won by a forward

players.appearance: Self-assured and sharp, a second finisher.
players.bio: Turmoil Novak is the selfish forward who doubles the threat on the break.

players.appearance: Older and careful, the calm deputy keeper.
players.bio: Frenzy Torres is the cautious veteran second keeper, dependable when called.

players.appearance: Selfless and steady, the dependable squad defender.
players.bio: Unruly Anderson is the team-first deputy who keeps the block intact in rotation.

players.appearance: Young and balanced, an academy defender on the rise.
players.bio: Riot Martinez is the promising young defender learning the edge's hard ways.

players.appearance: Inventive and raw, an academy playmaker in waiting.
players.bio: Ferment Chandra is the creative deputy who can unlock a stubborn block from the bench.

players.appearance: Lean and hungry, an academy striker with a selfish edge.
players.bio: Upheaval Ito is the eager young finisher pushing for a place at the system's edge.
